title: Surgeon Vacancy at Torrent Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Torrent Pharmaceuticals - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Bengaluru office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Torrent Pharmaceuticals:
Torrent Pharmaceuticals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Torrent Pharmaceuticals!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
